name: Rite of Spring+
descriptionTemplate: After the battle starts, Inflict [Arg1] {plural:[Arg1]|stack|stacks} of {Vulnerable} to all enemies, with the effect doubled in Boss Battles. All Awakener base DMG is +[Arg2]%.
lore: Amid the laughter of the night, the silhouette of the canoe glides effortlessly across the lake.
